---
title: "Unit 7: Linear & Quadratic Functions"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit7-functions')
from Functions import generate
from collections import defaultdict

data = generate(
    types=[
        # LT1 — Relations & Functions
        "relation_mapping",
        "relation_ordered_pairs",
        # LT2 — Representations
        "repr_table_to_eq",
        "repr_eq_to_table",
        # LT3 — Domain & Range
        "domain_range_set",
        "domain_range_linear",
        # LT4 — Linear Functions
        "linear_identify",
        "linear_evaluate",
        "linear_interpret",
        # LT5 — Slope & Rate of Change
        "slope_two_points",
        "slope_from_table",
        "slope_interpret",
        # LT6 — Linear Equations & Graphs
        "linear_graph_plot",
        "linear_write_from_graph",
        "linear_parallel",
        "linear_perpendicular",
        # LT7 — Linear Modeling
        "linear_model_word",
        # LT8 — Quadratic Functions & Conversions
        "quadratic_identify",
        "quadratic_evaluate",
        "quadratic_graph",
        "vertex_to_standard",
        "vertex_to_factored",
        "standard_to_vertex",
        "factored_to_standard",
        # LT9 — Key Features of Graphs
        "quadratic_vertex_formula",
        "quadratic_axis_symmetry",
        "quadratic_roots_graph",
        # LT12 — Domain & Range (Quadratic)
        "quadratic_domain_range",
        "quadratic_dr_from_graph",
        # LT13 — Quadratic Modeling
        "quadratic_model_projectile",
        "quadratic_model_revenue",
        # LT9 ext — read graph + find equation
        "quadratic_read_graph",
        # Intersection of linear and quadratic
        "linear_quadratic_intersection",
        # Vertical line test
        "vertical_line_test",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    show_solutions = True,
)

exercises = data["_exercises_qmd"]

# Group by difficulty
grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in exercises:
    grouped[ex["difficulty"]].append(ex)
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Functions-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}


## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Functions-Formulas.qmd >}}


## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">

<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/functions-algeb-61cc72/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title: "Linear & Quadratic Functions",
  unit: "Unit 7 · Functions",
  pyPath: "Functions.py",
  template: "word",
  count: 4,
  types: [
    "slope_two_points",
    "slope_from_table",
    "repr_table_to_eq",
    "linear_evaluate",
    "linear_identify",
    "linear_parallel",
    "linear_perpendicular",
    "vertex_to_standard",
    "factored_to_standard",
    "standard_to_vertex",
    "quadratic_vertex_formula",
    "quadratic_axis_symmetry",
    "quadratic_evaluate",
    "quadratic_domain_range"
  ]
};
</script>
```
